corrected_fields.summary: This source is a Federal Reserve navigation/listing page containing only year-based links to FOMC press release archives (2006-2026). The page itself contains no substantive research content—just a hierarchical menu structure and a 'Please enable JavaScript' notice. The last update timestamp is March 13, 2017. This page type is explicitly excluded from archival per Rule 8.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: Container pages provide no standalone research value. This page cannot serve as a source for macro catalyst analysis as it contains only navigation links to other pages, not actual FOMC content.
